positive: A majestic, stylized celestial guardian figure composed of cosmic elements, nebulae, stardust, and glowing ethereal armor. The figure stands centered, possessing a powerful yet serene silhouette, viewed from the front. The color palette is dominated by deep indigo, vibrant magenta, electric cyan, and shimmering gold accents. The art style is Neo-Art Deco mixed with mystical stained-glass engraving, creating sharp edges and dramatic internal glows. Emphasize strong geometric patterns forming the armor plates and flowing, symmetrical energy trails that frame the central figure. Highly detailed, flat vector art suitable for textile printing, high contrast, solid background separation, perfect symmetry, clean lines, pop art aesthetic.
negative: blur, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, logo, copyright, trademark, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly rendered, noise, grain, low contrast, signature, background bleed
